description: This file defines the AuthService class which implements core authentication logic for user registration, login, token issuance, refresh, and logout in a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: AuthService
classes.description: Service class implementing core authentication features such as registration, login, token refresh, and logout.

methods.name: registerApplicant
methods.description: Registers a new user with the applicant role, sets initial MFA settings, and saves to repository.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Authenticates user credentials and issues access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: issueTokens
methods.description: Generates new access and refresh tokens for a given user, stores refresh token hash.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Validates refresh token, revokes it, and issues new tokens.
